channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RNAVAL] Swan Defence Clarifies on Volume Increase
item.description:
Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd responded to an exchange query regarding a significant increase in trading volume. The company stated that it has made all necessary disclosures under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and has not withheld any material information that could affect the price or volume of its stock. The company affirms its commitment to complying with SEBI regulations and keeping the stock exchanges informed of all price-sensitive information.

  • Swan Defence confirms compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Company states all required disclosures have been made.
  • No material information withheld that could impact stock price/volume.
  • Swan Defence commits to informing exchanges of price-sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Reliance Naval and Engineering Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [BORORENEW] Borosil Renewables Allots 94,338 Equity Shares on Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Borosil Renewables Ltd has allotted 94,338 equity shares of Re. 1/- each, fully paid-up, to warrant holders who applied for conversion. This follows the allotment of 78,80,436 warrants on a preferential basis, convertible into equity shares at an issue price of ₹530/- each. The allotment was approved by the Management Committee of the Board of Directors on May 08, 2026, after receiving conversion notices and the balance payment of ₹397.50/- per warrant. Post-allotment, the paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased to ₹14,02,83,183.

  • Borosil Renewables allots 94,338 equity shares upon conversion of warrants.
  • The conversion price was ₹397.50 per warrant, representing 75% of the issue price.
  • Post-allotment, the paid-up equity share capital increases to ₹14,02,83,183.
  • Equity shares were allotted to Brescon Ventures and Trinity Credit Management.
  • New equity shares rank pari-passu with existing shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Borosil Renewables Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [KANPRPLA] Kanpur Plastipack Grants 404,740 Options Under ESOP 2025
item.description:
Kanpur Plastipack Ltd has granted 404,740 options to eligible employees under its Employee Stock Option Scheme 2025. The grant was approved by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee on May 08, 2026. These options are convertible into an equal number of equity shares with a face value of ₹10 each. The exercise price is determined at ₹202 per option. The options can be exercised within one year from the vesting date.

  • Kanpur Plastipack grants 404,740 options under ESOP 2025.
  • Options are convertible into equal number of equity shares of face value ₹10 each.
  • Exercise price set at ₹202 per option by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.
  • Options can be exercised within one year of vesting.
  • The scheme will be implemented through direct route for fresh allotment of shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KANPUR PLASTIPACK LTD. | Category: ESOP

item.title: [REMSONSIND] Remsons UK Wins ₹160 Cr Pedal Box Program Nomination
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Remsons Industries' UK subsidiary, Remsons Automotive Ltd, has been nominated by a global commercial vehicle OEM for a 10-year pedal box program. Production is scheduled to begin in Q4 CY2028. The nomination is valued at approximately ₹160 Crores over the program's lifetime. This nomination expands the company's commercial vehicle order book and strengthens its position as a Tier-1 supplier.

  • Remsons UK nominated for 10-year pedal box program by global OEM.
  • The program is valued at approximately ₹160 Crores.
  • Production start scheduled for Q4 CY2028.
  • This nomination expands Remsons' commercial vehicle order book.
  • Remsons strengthens position as Tier-1 supplier to global truck and bus manufacturers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REMSONS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JETINFRA] Jet Solar: Audited Financial Results for FY26 Approved
item.description:
Jet Solar Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the reappointment of Mr. Dipesh Maru as a Non-executive Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, subject to member approval. The meeting was held on May 08, 2026, and the financial results will be available on the company's website.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the Board.
  • Re-appointment of Independent Director Mr. Dipesh Maru approved, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Auditor's Report shows an unmodified opinion for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Financial results will be available on the company's website under the Investors Section.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jet Infraventure Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital Allots Commercial Paper Worth ₹35 Cr
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd has allotted commercial papers worth ₹35 Cr on May 08, 2026, through private placement. The allotment consists of 700 CPs with a face value of ₹5,00,000 each and an issue price of ₹4,79,430.50. These CPs, listed on the exchange, have a tenure of 180 days and will mature on November 04, 2026. Bank of Maharashtra is the IPA for this issuance.

  • Paisalo Digital allotted commercial papers worth ₹35 Cr on May 08, 2026.
  • The issuance consists of 700 CPs with a face value of ₹5,00,000 each.
  • CPs were issued through private placement and are listed.
  • The CPs have a tenure of 180 days, maturing on November 04, 2026.
  • Bank of Maharashtra is the IPA for this commercial paper issuance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [JETINFRA] Jet Solar Board Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Jet Solar Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting on May 8, 2026. The board also approved the reappointment of Mr. Dipesh Maru as a Non-executive Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, subject to member approval. The meeting commenced at 12:00 Noon and concluded at 12:30 P.M. The audited financial results are available on the company website.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Mr. Dipesh Maru reappointed as Independent Director for a second 5-year term.
  • Auditor's Report shows an unmodified opinion for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Financial results are available on the company's website under the Investors Section.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jet Infraventure Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [YASHINNO] Yash Innoventures Board Meeting on 12/05/2026
item.description:
Yash Innoventures Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 14, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of audited financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, to remain closed until May 14, 2026.
  • Meeting is in compliance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yash Innoventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DHYAANI] Dhyaani Tradeventtures: Promoter Group Seeks Reclassification
item.description:
Dhyaani Tradeventtures Ltd has received applications from its promoter group, Nayankumar L. Rajyaguru and Ilaben Nayanbhai Rajyaguru, to reclassify their status from 'Promoter Group' to 'Public' under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR 2015. The promoters, who previously resigned as directors and hold no shares, cite their lack of involvement in the company's operations and governance as the rationale. The re-classification is subject to approval from the Board of Directors, Company Members, and BSE Limited.

  • Promoter group seeks reclassification to 'Public' category.
  • Nayankumar L. Rajyaguru and Ilaben Nayanbhai Rajyaguru are the promoters seeking reclassification.
  • Promoters cite no shareholding and no involvement in company operations.
  • Reclassification is subject to approvals from the Board, Members, and BSE.
  • The application is made under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhyaani Tile and Marblez Ltd | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [DEEDEV] Dee Development: April 2026 Order Book at ₹1,909.82 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dee Development Engineers Ltd. announced its order book update for April 2026. The company's order book stood at ₹1,909.82 crores as of April 30, 2026, with cumulative order inflow for FY 2026-27 at ₹49.94 crores and cumulative order execution at ₹67.48 crores. The update includes details on pipings and heavy fabrication across various sectors like power, oil & gas, and gas plants. Additionally, the company is L1 for orders worth ₹211 crores pending formal purchase orders.

  • Dee Development's order book as of April 30, 2026, is ₹1,909.82 crores.
  • Cumulative order inflow for FY 2026-27 reached ₹49.94 crores by April 30, 2026.
  • Cumulative order execution for FY 2026-27 totaled ₹67.48 crores as of April 2026.
  • The company is expecting ₹211 crores in additional orders from reputed clients.
  • Tariff rate for FY 2026-27 for Malwa Power Private Limited is ₹5.437 per kWh.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dee Development Engineers Ltd | Category: Business Update
